name: gdb-peda
title: gdb-peda
summary: Python Exploit Development Assistance for GDB
description:
Python Exploit Development Assistance for GDB
This package contains a Python GDB script with many handy commands to help
speed up exploit development process on Linux/Unix. It is also a framework for
writing custom interactive Python GDB commands.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gdb-peda because Python Exploit Development Assistance for GDB.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use gdb-peda as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gdb-peda with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gdb-peda --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
